message:
feat(tui): enrich board detail pane with labels, relative dates, and graph metrics

Board detail:
- Display labels (4 max + overflow), relative dates (age,
  last-updated), graph metrics (PageRank, critical depth,
  articulation points)

Tree mode:
- Add priority badges (P0-P4), blocker indicators, unblocks
  indicators with issue IDs, cycle membership markers, status icons

Actionable mode:
- Show priority badges on track items; display actual unblocked
  issue IDs (up to 2 + overflow) instead of just counts

Code formatting cleanup for multi-line method chain readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
